title: Knaves' Needs Recipes Fix
description: This mod fixes all Knaves' Needs recipes for mods available on Forge 1.20.1
body:
Knaves' Needs is a great addon for Simply Swords, but it has some issues. And by issues, I mean loads of fumbled recipes. So I did KodoDenka's homework and fixed them all... well, at least those for mods available on Forge 1.20.1


With this mod, you will be able to craft the following items, which are otherwise unobtainable in survival:

Blue Skies':
Aquite Halberd,
Bluebright Wood Halberd,
All Frostbright Wood weapons,
All Cherry (Comet) Wood weapons

Forbidden and Arcanus':
All Reinforced Deorum weapons,
Draco Arcanus Katana,
Draco Arcanus Scythe

Undergarden's:
All Halberds


Here is my Discord server: [https://discord.gg/AScKNEcjDX](https://discord.gg/AScKNEcjDX)
